page: Microsoft Azure EC16as_v6 is an x86_64 architecture server instance belonging to the ECasv6 family. It features 16 dedicated vCPUs powered by AMD processors and is managed via the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. The instance is configured with 128.0 GB of system memory, providing a high memory-to-vCPU ratio of 8.0 GB per core.

This server configuration does not include local storage, meaning all storage requirements must be met using external options, though the instance is Premium Storage capable. There are no onboard GPUs, with a GPU count of 0.0, and it does not include any complimentary public IPv4 addresses.

Given its high memory density of 8.0 GB per vCPU, the EC16as_v6 offers qualitative cost efficiency for memory-intensive workloads that do not require local disk space or hardware acceleration. It is suitable for memory-optimized workloads such as relational databases, in-memory caching systems, and enterprise applications requiring substantial RAM allocations relative to compute resources.
description: Microsoft Azure EC16as_v6 is an x86_64 memory-optimized server instance within the ECasv6 family, powered by AMD processors and managed via Microsoft Hyper-V. It features 16 dedicated vCPUs and 128.0 GB of system memory, yielding a high resource density of 8.0 GB of RAM per core. The instance does not include local storage, requiring external Premium Storage solutions, and lacks onboard GPU acceleration. With zero complimentary public IPv4 addresses, it is designed for secure, backend deployments. The high memory-to-vCPU ratio makes this server qualitatively cost-effective for memory-intensive workloads, such as relational databases, caching layers, and enterprise applications that demand significant memory capacity without the need for local physical disks or graphics processing units.
og_description: Microsoft Azure EC16as_v6 is an x86_64 memory-optimized server instance featuring 16 dedicated AMD vCPUs, 128 GB of RAM, and Premium Storage capability, designed for database workloads.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure EC16as_v6 is an x86_64 memory-optimized server featuring 16 dedicated AMD vCPUs, 128 GB of RAM, and support for Premium Storage.
tagline: An x86_64 memory-optimized virtual machine featuring sixteen dedicated cores and a high memory-to-vCPU ratio for memory-intensive enterprise workloads.

128.0 GB of system memory providing 8.0 GB per core
